title: eleocharis amazonica
intro: Eleocharis amazonica, also known as Amazon spike-rush, is a type of aquatic plant belonging to the sedge family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant's health benefits include soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Eleocharis amazonica can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal use, although its effectiveness and safety should be further researched and confirmed.
